topWPAPlays.description: Kerry Carpenter homers (11) on a fly ball to right field. Kevin McGonigle scores.
Kevin McGonigle singles on a ground ball to second baseman Jose Altuve, deflected by first baseman Christian Walker. James Outman to 3rd.
Jose Altuve grounds into a double play, shortstop Kevin McGonigle to second baseman Zach McKinstry to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Christian Walker out at 2nd. Jose Altuve out at 1st.
Colt Keith homers (5) on a fly ball to right field.
Matt Vierling strikes out swinging.
Noelvi Marte homers (4) on a line drive to left center field. Sal Stewart scores.
Esmerlyn Valdez homers (3) on a fly ball to left field.
Marcell Ozuna homers (7) on a fly ball to center field.
Tyler Stephenson singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Esmerlyn Valdez. Eugenio Suárez scores. Spencer Steer to 3rd.
Nick Gonzales strikes out swinging.
Blaze Alexander singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Dylan Crews. Coby Mayo scores. Tyler O'Neill scores. Jackson Holliday to 2nd.
Andrés Chaparro reaches on a fielder's choice out, third baseman Blaze Alexander to catcher Samuel Basallo. James Wood out at home.
Dylan Crews doubles (5) on a ground ball to left fielder Taylor Ward.
Coby Mayo doubles (9) on a sharp line drive to left fielder José Tena. Taylor Ward scores. Pete Alonso to 3rd.
Keibert Ruiz singles on a line drive to center fielder Leody Taveras. Jacob Young scores.
Kazuma Okamoto homers (19) on a fly ball to left center field. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. scores.
Brandon Valenzuela walks.
Brandon Nimmo doubles (20) on a line drive to right fielder Nathan Lukes. Wyatt Langford scores. Josh Jung to 3rd.
Andrés Giménez pops out to third baseman Josh Jung in foul territory.
George Springer flies out sharply to left fielder Jarred Kelenic in foul territory.
J.P. Crawford singles on a ground ball to second baseman Travis Bazzana. Cal Raleigh scores.
Josh Naylor grounds into a double play, shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Cal Raleigh to 3rd. Dominic Canzone out at 2nd. Josh Naylor out at 1st.
Colt Emerson homers (7) on a fly ball to right field.
Kahlil Watson doubles (1) on a sharp fly ball to left fielder Randy Arozarena. Kyle Manzardo scores.
Julio Rodríguez singles on a line drive to left fielder Steven Kwan. Colt Emerson scores. Randy Arozarena to 2nd.
Junior Caminero homers (20) on a fly ball to center field. Yandy Díaz scores. Jonathan Aranda scores.
Gabriel Moreno singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Victor Mesa Jr., deflected by shortstop Taylor Walls. Corbin Carroll to 3rd.
Geraldo Perdomo homers (5) on a fly ball to right center field.
Max Kepler lines out to third baseman Junior Caminero.
Nolan Arenado pops out softly to first baseman Jonathan Aranda in foul territory.
Trea Turner singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Juan Soto. Derek Hill scores. Bryson Stott to 2nd.
Alec Bohm lines into an unassisted double play, first baseman Jared Young. Kyle Schwarber out at 1st.
Alec Bohm grounds into a double play, third baseman Brett Baty to second baseman Ronny Mauricio to first baseman Jared Young. Bryce Harper out at 2nd. Alec Bohm out at 1st.
Jared Young challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Jared Young called out on strikes.
Juan Soto grounds out, second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper.
Willson Contreras singles on a line drive to center fielder Spencer Jones. Wilyer Abreu scores.
Anthony Seigler singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Spencer Jones. Caleb Durbin to 3rd.
Willson Contreras homers (17) on a fly ball to left field.
Connor Wong walks. Anthony Seigler to 2nd.
Caleb Durbin singles on a soft bunt ground ball to third baseman José Caballero.
Miguel Vargas homers (18) on a fly ball to left field. Jacob Gonzalez scores. Sam Antonacci scores.
Sam Antonacci singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Lane Thomas. Jacob Gonzalez to 3rd.
Tristan Peters singles on a ground ball to center fielder Lane Thomas. Andrew Benintendi scores. Chase Meidroth scores. Braden Montgomery to 3rd.
Chase Meidroth singles on a ground ball to shortstop Josh Rojas. Kyle Teel scores. Andrew Benintendi to 3rd.
Andrew Benintendi doubles (11) on a line drive to right fielder Jac Caglianone. Kyle Teel to 3rd.
Garrett Mitchell homers (6) on a fly ball to right center field. Jake Bauers scores.
Andrew Vaughn lines into a double play, pitcher Ethan Roberts to second baseman Nico Hoerner. William Contreras out at 2nd.
Seiya Suzuki homers (11) on a fly ball to center field.
David Hamilton triples (2) on a fly ball to left fielder Ian Happ. Cooper Pratt scores.
Jake Bauers walks. William Contreras to 2nd.
Hunter Goodman homers (22) on a fly ball to left field. Braxton Fulford scores.
Byron Buxton singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jake McCarthy, deflected by third baseman Willi Castro. Austin Martin scores. Ryan Kreidler to 2nd.
Ezequiel Tovar reaches on a fielder's choice out, shortstop Ryan Kreidler to catcher Victor Caratini. Tyler Freeman out at home.
Kody Clemens homers (12) on a fly ball to right field. Byron Buxton scores.
Kyle Karros doubles (14) on a line drive to left fielder Austin Martin.
Graham Pauley doubles (7) on a ground ball to right fielder Jordan Walker. Esteury Ruiz scores.
Nathan Church lines out to left fielder Esteury Ruiz.
Masyn Winn grounds into a force out, shortstop Otto Lopez to catcher Joe Mack. Iván Herrera out at home. Jordan Walker to 3rd. Lars Nootbaar to 2nd. Masyn Winn to 1st.
Alec Burleson walks. Iván Herrera to 2nd.
Joe Mack grounds into a double play, pitcher Michael McGreevy to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Owen Caissie out at 2nd. Joe Mack out at 1st.
Jeff McNeil singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jo Adell. Jonah Heim scores. Lawrence Butler scores. Max Muncy to 3rd.
Donovan Walton singles on a line drive to center fielder Henry Bolte. Wade Meckler scores.

Alika Williams singles on a ground ball to center fielder Josh Lowe. Max Muncy scores. Jeff McNeil to 3rd. Alika Williams to 2nd. Alika Williams advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by center fielder Josh Lowe.
Jo Adell grounds into a double play, pitcher J.T. Ginn to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Zach Neto to 3rd. Nolan Schanuel out at 2nd. Jo Adell out at 1st.
Max Muncy singles on a ground ball to shortstop Zach Neto, deflected by second baseman Donovan Walton. Jonah Heim to 3rd. Lawrence Butler to 2nd.
Ty France homers (10) on a fly ball to left field. Manny Machado scores. Gavin Sheets scores.
Mookie Betts grounds into a double play, second baseman Sung-Mun Song to first baseman Ty France. Freddie Freeman out at 2nd. Mookie Betts out at 1st.
Freddie Freeman doubles (20) on a fly ball to left fielder Samad Taylor. Andy Pages to 3rd.
Max Muncy pops out to third baseman Manny Machado on the infield fly rule.
Kyle Tucker flies out to center fielder Jackson Merrill.
Bryce Eldridge pops out to second baseman Ozzie Albies.
Rafael Devers doubles (24) on a fly ball to right fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Casey Schmitt scores.
Bryce Eldridge strikes out swinging.
Casey Schmitt grounds into a force out, shortstop Ha-Seong Kim to second baseman Ozzie Albies. Luis Arraez out at 2nd.
Casey Schmitt flies out to right fielder Mike Yastrzemski.
